task: Build the Harness OS recommerce discovery dashboard UX

governance_bootstrap.summary: Verified CEO decision boundaries, mobile-first UI, evidence-backed completion, and cross-LLM audit requirements before closeout.
Verified origin-main deployment, Mac Mini real-entrypoint checks, runtime atomic writes, and completion guard invariants.

scope: CEO write and VP read-only role boundary
supplier and SKU evidence with full variable-cost review
no purchase, sale, advertising, deposit, publication, or capital action

verification.name: focused recommerce core and API tests
verification.target: local API and atomic runtime workspace
verification.result: passed 12 tests including authentication, CEO-VP boundary, CAS conflict, full cost, individual zero-cost confirmation, and restricted-item quarantine

verification.name: Harness OS production bundle build
verification.result: passed TypeScript and Vite build after Red Team remediation; generated index-O_ztmCkx.js and index-CvOOTXd3.css locally

verification.name: changed frontend lint
verification.command: cd harness-os/frontend && npx eslint src/pages/RecommercePage.tsx src/components/TopBar.tsx src/App.tsx
verification.result: passed with zero errors; three pre-existing App.tsx hook warnings remain

verification.name: Mac Mini production API and role-boundary check
verification.target: macmini production API and launchd service
verification.command: authenticated GET and non-mutating rejected POST checks against http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/recommerce/workspace
verification.result: passed: missing secret 401, VP GET 200, VP write 403, CEO invalid action 400, version 0, Phase 3-4 locked, runtime file still absent

verification.name: Mac Mini production bundle and process check
verification.target: macmini production dist and frontend URL
verification.command: curl 127.0.0.1:5173 index and asset; inspect launchd backend, port 5173, and scoped origin diff
verification.result: passed: index-DH9qTKqD.js contains recommerce-opportunity-workspace; backend running; 5173 listening; scoped origin diff 0

verification.name: Mac Mini focused recommerce regression suite

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with the 13 scoped implementation, test, plan, review, and evidence paths
deploy.result: final Mac Mini deployment passed: backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260719_184303, atomic frontend bundle index-DH9qTKqD.js, backend launchd reload, 12 production-repo tests, authenticated live API role checks, bundle marker, and target origin diff zero

residual_risk: In-app browser was unavailable; the fallback verification used the production API, served bundle marker, launchd/process state, responsive CSS, accessibility source checks, and Mac Mini regression tests.
Restricted-item keyword screening is conservative and does not replace later human product-safety and legal review.
